Services.metaDescription: Discreet commercial frame: diagnostics, retained executive search, executive sparring, board and governance participation.
Services.title: Services
Services.lede: Useful transparency — without a brochure. Figures are orders of magnitude; final framing is set at mandate.
Services.s01Quote: “Before the tool: the map of power and pace.”
Services.s01Scope: Short mapping of the implicit mandate: decisions, ownership of change, human bottlenecks, public exposure. Sober outputs: executive summary and recommended trade-offs — not a slide deck.
Services.s01Duration: 3 to 5 weeks depending on access and scope.
Services.s01Mechanics: Targeted interviews, selective document review, debrief in an executive session.
Services.s01Guarantee: No promise of an “AI roadmap”. Commitment to clarity: what is workable, under what ownership, at what horizon.
Services.s02Scope: Operational role definition, evaluation criteria, targeted market, confidential approach, qualified shortlist, support through final arbitration.
Services.s02Duration: 12 to 20 weeks depending on level and market.
Services.s02PricingLead: Minority success fees; majority fixed base.

s02PricingRows.label: Success at start date
s02PricingRows.value: tied to target compensation — scale in mandate letter

Services.s02Mechanics: Exclusive retained search on the defined scope; no parallel chase on the same mandate.
Services.s02Guarantee: Limited-time replacement guarantee — written conditions in contract.
Services.s02Payment: Retainer at opening, milestones, balance at start date.
Services.s03Quote: “A space to decide without an audience.”
Services.s03Scope: Tight sessions with the top: trade-offs, blind spots, political tempo, preparation for sensitive decisions. Not generic “performance coaching”.
Services.s03Duration: 6 to 12 months, monthly or bi-monthly rhythm.
Services.s03Mechanics: Fixed agenda, controlled duration, contractual confidentiality.
Services.s03Guarantee: No decorative deliverables: decisions and watchpoints documented only if useful to the client.
Services.s04Scope: Board or strategic committee participation: framing of AI and transformation stakes, vigilance on trade-offs, targeted input without substituting for executive management.
Services.s04Duration: Mandate aligned with the board calendar — typically 12 to 36 months.
Services.s04PricingLead: Fees calibrated to scope (independent director, committee advisor, time-bound mandate).
Services.s04Mechanics: Clear mandate letter, independence and conflict disclosures, rhythm aligned with the board calendar.
Services.s04Guarantee: No ambiguous dual role: scope, transparency, and professional standards are explicit.
Services.s04Payment: Per mandate: annual, quarterly, or milestones tied to meetings.
